name: Shirox
subtitle: Anime streaming app for iOS
description:
Shirox is a free, open-source anime streaming app for iOS 17+.

Browse and watch anime using community-built modules. AniList integration for tracking and discovery.

apps.name: Shirox
apps.subtitle: Open-source anime streaming for iOS
apps.localizedDescription:
Shirox is a free, open-source anime streaming app for iOS 17+.

• Browse anime powered by community modules
• AniList integration for discovery and tracking
• Continue Watching — pick up right where you left off
• Picture-in-Picture and AirPlay support
• Subtitle support
